## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in between Ramp and GrowthX to discuss content performance, ongoing projects, and address any questions or concerns.](https://fathom.video/share/z6uKXzbo2KSdbo1bDMgNu4cpCV2tZn6X?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance remains stable across most page types, with slight fluctuations in specific areas](https://fathom.video/share/z6uKXzbo2KSdbo1bDMgNu4cpCV2tZn6X?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [Progress on vendor pages and editorial reflections is on track, with 34 new pages to be published by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/z6uKXzbo2KSdbo1bDMgNu4cpCV2tZn6X?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)
  - [Table formatting in Sanity CMS remains a challenge; web engineering team is working on a solution](https://fathom.video/share/z6uKXzbo2KSdbo1bDMgNu4cpCV2tZn6X?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
  - [Automation of vendor page publishing process to resume next week after internal projects wrap up](https://fathom.video/share/z6uKXzbo2KSdbo1bDMgNu4cpCV2tZn6X?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Overview

  - [Blog pages: Sessions held steady, consistent with recent trends](https://fathom.video/share/z6uKXzbo2KSdbo1bDMgNu4cpCV2tZn6X?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [Per-diem pages: Slight drop, potentially due to Travelperk's UX improvements](https://fathom.video/share/z6uKXzbo2KSdbo1bDMgNu4cpCV2tZn6X?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [Expense category: Continuing steady decline, limited options for improvement](https://fathom.video/share/z6uKXzbo2KSdbo1bDMgNu4cpCV2tZn6X?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
  - [Tuning pages: Session jump, driven by cash flow statement blog performance](https://fathom.video/share/z6uKXzbo2KSdbo1bDMgNu4cpCV2tZn6X?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [Treasure pages: Maintained usual range](https://fathom.video/share/z6uKXzbo2KSdbo1bDMgNu4cpCV2tZn6X?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [Vendor pages: Sessions stable, new pages (e.g., DevOps) gaining traction](https://fathom.video/share/z6uKXzbo2KSdbo1bDMgNu4cpCV2tZn6X?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)

### Ongoing Projects and Updates

  - [Two editorial reflections in progress, balancing with vendor page creation](https://fathom.video/share/z6uKXzbo2KSdbo1bDMgNu4cpCV2tZn6X?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
  - [Sample 5 articles being sent, aiming for a more centered tone](https://fathom.video/share/z6uKXzbo2KSdbo1bDMgNu4cpCV2tZn6X?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [34 vendor pages to be published by early Friday](https://fathom.video/share/z6uKXzbo2KSdbo1bDMgNu4cpCV2tZn6X?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)
  - [Data wrapper IDs received and implementation begun](https://fathom.video/share/z6uKXzbo2KSdbo1bDMgNu4cpCV2tZn6X?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
  - [Overview pages for content creation and web hosting under review](https://fathom.video/share/z6uKXzbo2KSdbo1bDMgNu4cpCV2tZn6X?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [Shopify page drafted without line chart, as requested](https://fathom.video/share/z6uKXzbo2KSdbo1bDMgNu4cpCV2tZn6X?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)
  - [CRM and AI pages on track for delivery on B27](https://fathom.video/share/z6uKXzbo2KSdbo1bDMgNu4cpCV2tZn6X?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)

### Table Formatting in Sanity CMS

  - [Current method for rendering tables is complex and not easily replicable](https://fathom.video/share/z6uKXzbo2KSdbo1bDMgNu4cpCV2tZn6X?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
  - [Web engineering team exploring solutions for 2 months](https://fathom.video/share/z6uKXzbo2KSdbo1bDMgNu4cpCV2tZn6X?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
  - [Potential future solution: HTML or markdown copy-paste for entire tables](https://fathom.video/share/z6uKXzbo2KSdbo1bDMgNu4cpCV2tZn6X?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
  - [Matt to follow up with Luke on progress and potential editor changes](https://fathom.video/share/z6uKXzbo2KSdbo1bDMgNu4cpCV2tZn6X?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)

### Vendor Page Publishing Automation

  - [Project temporarily slowed due to internal audit and other projects](https://fathom.video/share/z6uKXzbo2KSdbo1bDMgNu4cpCV2tZn6X?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Full-speed work to resume early next week](https://fathom.video/share/z6uKXzbo2KSdbo1bDMgNu4cpCV2tZn6X?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)
  - [Team anticipates progress updates soon](https://fathom.video/share/z6uKXzbo2KSdbo1bDMgNu4cpCV2tZn6X?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Publish 34 vendor pages by early Friday](https://fathom.video/share/z6uKXzbo2KSdbo1bDMgNu4cpCV2tZn6X?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)
